online-registration.status: In production, docs synced with all post-PDCA features
online-registration.notes: Plan v2 and Design v5 updated on 2026-03-14 to include 27 post-PDCA features: Register for Others, T-shirt Size, Guardian Consent, PDF Invoice/Receipt, Smart Polling, Admin Presence, Cover Fees, Payment Method Discount, E-Pass Repair, Stripe Sync, and more. Only 5 items remain deferred (PWA, i18n, Google Sheets, Donation, Magic Room Generator).
